expectations.text: Recommends a specific workspace manager (pnpm, npm, or yarn) with reasoning
expectations.evidence: Recommends pnpm v10 with reasoning: 'default package manager should be pnpm v10 (strict workspace behavior + catalogs to kill version drift)'

expectations.text: Recommends a specific orchestrator (Turborepo or Nx) with reasoning for this scale
expectations.evidence: Recommends Turborepo with reasoning from skill decision tree: 'JS/TS-only and under ~20 packages favors Turborepo for lower config overhead'

expectations.text: Provides actual pnpm-workspace.yaml or equivalent config content
expectations.evidence: Full pnpm-workspace.yaml with packages globs AND catalog entries for centralized versions

expectations.text: Provides turbo.json or nx.json pipeline/task config content
expectations.evidence: Full turbo.json with build/typecheck/lint/test/dev tasks, correct dependsOn, inputs, and outputs

expectations.text: Includes CI workflow snippet with affected-only builds
Mentions migration strategy for preserving git history
expectations.evidence: Two strategies: git-filter-repo (recommended, with full commands) and git subtree add (simpler alternative)

expectations.text: Mentions remote caching (Vercel Remote Cache or Nx Cloud)
expectations.evidence: TURBO_TOKEN/TURBO_TEAM env vars in CI workflow, explanation that remote cache avoids recomputing unchanged tasks
